Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current R1 Concepts brake parts product data, promotions, and featured categories from the live website.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email reflects the latest inventory, pricing, and seasonal promotions without manual content gathering.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a complete daily marketing email including subject line, body copy, and call-to-action using Claude AI based on scraped product data.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces professional, brand-consistent email content daily without requiring a copywriter, saving hours of creative work each day.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Creates the marketing email in HubSpot via the Marketing Email API and sends it to the designated contact lists.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates the full send workflow including list targeting and delivery, ensuring consistent daily outreach to segmented audiences.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes Dynamic Friction Company product listings, current deals, and brand messaging from the DFC website.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Keeps email content aligned with DFC's latest catalog and promotions without manual research by the marketing team.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a daily DFC-branded marketing email with subject line, persuasive copy, and product recommendations using Claude AI.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Eliminates the daily content creation bottleneck, producing on-brand emails that drive engagement and conversions automatically.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes and sends the generated email through HubSpot Marketing Email API to DFC contact lists.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures reliable daily delivery to targeted DFC customer segments with full tracking and analytics built in.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls new and updated support tickets from HubSpot including ticket details, customer history, and conversation threads.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Gives the AI full context on each support case instantly, eliminating manual ticket review and reducing first-response time.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and urgency, then drafts a contextual reply referencing product knowledge and DFC resources.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Accelerates ticket resolution by auto-categorizing issues and producing draft responses, freeing support agents to focus on complex cases.

R1 Support Agent.action: Updates the ticket with the AI-assigned classification and attaches the drafted reply for agent review and sending.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Support reps receive pre-written, categorized responses they can approve in seconds, dramatically reducing average handle time.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions collected through HubSpot from customer-facing QR code forms.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Centralizes all product return and issue data from Amazon customers into one queryable source, capturing feedback that would otherwise be lost.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs each submission into a structured Google Sheets tracker with formatted columns for filtering, trending, and team analysis.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Enables the operations team to spot recurring product defects, common return reasons, and quality trends at a glance without pulling reports manually.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot for DFC customer activity signals such as website visits, page views, and engagement events on the R1 website.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Detects buying intent in real time so the sales team can act on warm leads before the opportunity goes cold.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends real-time alert messages to the DFC sales team via Microsoft Teams channels and email with customer activity details.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Sales reps receive instant, actionable notifications allowing them to reach out while the customer is actively browsing, increasing close rates.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will serve as a customer-facing AI chat agent for R1 Concepts, handling product inquiries, order questions, and support requests directly.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Once live, will provide 24/7 instant customer support, reducing wait times and deflecting common inquiries from the human support team.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will process customer messages, retrieve relevant product and order information, and generate helpful conversational responses in real time.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will enable scalable, consistent customer interactions that maintain R1 brand standards while handling high inquiry volumes effortlessly.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Interprets keyword inputs and generates optimized search queries across multiple platforms to identify relevant content creators.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Transforms simple keyword briefs into comprehensive multi-platform search strategies, eliminating hours of manual creator research.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube for channels and videos matching the generated queries, collecting creator profiles, subscriber counts, and content metrics.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Surfaces YouTube creators with proven audiences in the target niche, providing data-driven discovery at scale.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Scrapes Instagram profiles matching discovery criteria to collect follower counts, engagement rates, and content style data.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Expands the creator pool beyond YouTube to include Instagram influencers, capturing cross-platform partnership opportunities.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Performs supplementary web searches to discover creators on blogs, TikTok, and other platforms not covered by direct API integrations.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Catches creators operating outside mainstream platforms, ensuring a comprehensive discovery pipeline with no blind spots.

Creator Qualifier.action: Evaluates each discovered creator against customizable scoring weights including audience size, engagement quality, niche relevance, and content consistency.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Replaces subjective manual vetting with a standardized, data-driven scoring system that ranks creators by partnership potential in seconds.

Creator Qualifier.action: Generates a qualification summary for each creator with strengths, risks, and a recommendation on whether to proceed with outreach.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Gives the partnerships team clear, actionable briefs on every candidate so they can confidently prioritize top-tier creators.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves learned outreach sequences, email templates, and brand guidelines from Google Drive to inform personalized messaging.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures every outreach email follows proven sequences and brand standards, maintaining consistency across hundreds of creator contacts.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each qualified creator using their profile data, learned sequences, and tailored prompts.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces highly personalized, conversion-optimized outreach at scale, dramatically increasing response rates compared to generic templates.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails directly from the team's Gmail account and tracks delivery and open status.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates the entire send process while maintaining a personal sender identity, enabling outreach to dozens of creators daily without manual effort.

Creator Reponse.action: Monitors the inbox for creator replies and retrieves full conversation threads including previous negotiation context.
Creator Reponse.impact: Captures every creator response instantly so no reply is missed, maintaining momentum in active negotiations.

Creator Reponse.action: Pulls historical influencer email conversations, negotiation outcomes, and deal terms from Google Drive to inform the AI's response strategy.
Creator Reponse.impact: Leverages institutional knowledge from past deals so the AI negotiates with context, avoiding repeat mistakes and applying proven tactics.

Creator Reponse.action: Drafts intelligent follow-up responses using learned negotiation patterns, adjusting tone and offers based on the creator's reply sentiment and history.
Creator Reponse.impact: Handles multi-turn negotiations autonomously with human-like nuance, freeing the partnerships team to focus on finalizing high-value deals.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends the AI-drafted negotiation response back to the creator within the existing email thread.
Creator Reponse.impact: Keeps response times fast and conversations flowing naturally, increasing the likelihood of closing partnership agreements.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Generates formatted DFC Must Have Monday load sheet and accompanying sales sheet from the matched data.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Produces print-ready and email-ready documents automatically, saving the team from repetitive formatting and layout work each week.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Creates and sends the weekly Must Have Monday HubSpot email with the sales sheet and load sheet attached or linked.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Posts a notification or confirmation to the relevant Teams channel when the MHM load sheet and email have been generated and sent.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates email copy for DFC First to Market product launch announcements and monthly recap emails using product details and launch context.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Produces polished, on-brand email content in seconds, freeing marketing from writing each launch and recap email from scratch.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle reporting metrics including lead counts, conversion rates, and email performance data for the reporting period.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Retrieves website traffic, session data, and user engagement metrics from Google Analytics 4 for the reporting month.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls SMS campaign performance metrics including send volume, click-through rates, and revenue attribution from Attentive.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Analyzes current keyword rankings and identifies keyword gaps where R1 Concepts underperforms relative to competitors.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts uploaded MHM vehicle part number lists and the New Availability Guide, then matches parts against available inventory within the browser.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Extracts and analyzes Dream sales data including purchase history, order frequency, product categories, and customer profiles for DFC accounts.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors the designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen containing the latest Super Session Saturday content.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates B2B-focused SEO blog content targeting auto shops, distributors, and fleet operators with relevant product and industry topics for DFC.

Bomb File Project.action: Scoping and requirements gathering for the Bomb File project, defining data sources, outputs, and integration targets.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls search performance data for DFC blog content including impressions, clicks, average position, and keyword rankings.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Collects monthly traffic, engagement, and conversion data for R1 blog pages to measure content performance and audience behavior.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Receives incoming vendor PO invoice PDF attachments from the Outlook inbox.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Monitors and feeds DFC prospect search and page visit data to inform which triggers are relevant for outreach.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Ingests incoming customer support tickets submitted to R1 Concepts, capturing issue details and customer information.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls the latest weekly performance metrics from all active paid channels including Meta, TikTok, and Google Ads.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status data including on-hand quantities, on-order details, and in-transit shipments for all parts appearing on the backorder report.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces the manual lookup process that previously required a dozen people doing independent searches across systems, saving hours of collective labor weekly.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Automates the tedious process of manually browsing three separate competitor catalogs, capturing comprehensive market data in minutes instead of days.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor rotor data against DFC's existing two-piece rotor inventory to identify overlaps and gaps in coverage.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Reveals exactly where DFC competes and where market opportunities exist, giving Dino a clear roadmap for product expansion decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated customer outreach emails to gather demand data on two-piece rotors, asking about interest levels and vehicle applications they need.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Collects real customer demand signals to validate which gaps are worth filling, ensuring inventory investments are backed by actual market interest.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped data, cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into one formatted master reference sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a single, comprehensive output that combines competitor intelligence, inventory analysis, and demand data — ready for strategic review and action.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active ad campaigns across Meta and TikTok, extracting the full ad copy from every creative including headlines, body text, and descriptions.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides instant visibility into all live ad content across platforms, eliminating the need to manually click through dozens of campaigns and ad sets.

Meta Investigation.action: Searches all extracted ad copy for specific target phrases and flags every match, noting the exact field and full copy where each phrase was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Catches compliance issues, outdated messaging, or unauthorized claims across hundreds of ads in seconds — work that would take hours of manual review.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a comprehensive flagged list to the requester showing every matched phrase, the ad it appeared in, and the exact field and copy containing the match.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers an actionable audit report on demand, enabling the marketing team to quickly remediate problem ads before they cause compliance or brand issues.

summary: Here's this week's update on our AI automation pipeline. We're tracking 54 total agents — 22 completed, 12 in progress, and 20 planned. Two new agents were added to the pipeline this week: **R1 Video Clipper** and **Paid Channel Chat bot**, both entering the planned stage. No stage changes to report this week, so the team is heads-down building across our current in-progress projects. Steady momentum all around — more updates coming next week!
